title: Tech Boom in the Silicon Valley
description: A sudden surge in technology startups has led to an economic boom in our tech sectors. How should we capitalize on this?

options.text: Subsidize the startups to encourage growth.
Tax them heavily to fill state coffers.

title: Border Skirmish
description: Minor clashes have been reported at the northern border. Tensions are high.

options.text: Send military reinforcements.
Open diplomatic channels to de-escalate.

title: Global Economic Summit
description: We have been invited to host the annual global economic summit. It will be expensive but prestigious.

options.text: Host the summit with grand preparations.
Decline politely.

title: Protests in the Capital
description: Citizens are taking to the streets protesting recent policy changes.

options.text: Address their concerns and promise reforms.
Deploy riot police to disperse the crowds.

title: Scientific Breakthrough
description: Our national laboratory has made a significant breakthrough in renewable energy.

options.text: Keep the research classified for national advantage.
Share the findings with the world.

title: Cybersecurity Threat
description: A sophisticated state-sponsored hacker group has breached several government servers.

options.text: Invest in a massive cybersecurity overhaul.
Launch a counter-hack.

title: Natural Disaster
description: A severe earthquake has struck the eastern provinces, causing widespread damage.

options.text: Deploy emergency services and relief funds immediately.
Request international aid.

title: Lucrative Trade Agreement
description: A neighboring country is offering a very lucrative trade agreement, but it requires environmental concessions.

options.text: Accept the agreement for economic gain.
Reject it to protect the environment.

title: Spy Uncovered
description: Our counter-intelligence has captured a foreign spy operating in the defense ministry.

options.text: Publicly try the spy to embarrass their nation.
Quietly exchange the spy for one of our own.

title: Diplomatic Incident
description: Our ambassador has caused a scandal at a state dinner abroad.

options.text: Recall the ambassador and apologize.
Stand by our ambassador.

title: New Pandemic Strain
description: A new, highly contagious virus strain has been detected in a major city.

options.text: Enforce strict lockdowns and fund vaccine research.
Issue health warnings but keep the economy open.

title: Infrastructure Failure
description: A major bridge has collapsed during rush hour, highlighting our aging infrastructure.

options.text: Launch a nationwide infrastructure renewal program.
Repair only the collapsed bridge.

title: National Cultural Festival
description: It's time for the annual National Cultural Festival. How much should the state sponsor?

options.text: Sponsor a grand festival.
Let the private sector handle it.

title: Corruption Scandal
description: A high-ranking minister has been caught embezzling state funds.

options.text: Launch a public anti-corruption probe.
Cover it up to maintain government stability.

title: Energy Crisis
description: Fuel shortages are leading to rolling blackouts across the nation.

options.text: Import expensive emergency fuel.
Ration energy usage.

title: Space Agency Launch
description: Our national space agency is ready to launch a new satellite.

options.text: Fund a high-profile, risky mission.
Opt for a safe, routine launch.

title: Election Campaign Season
description: Elections are approaching, and the political climate is tense.

options.text: Increase public spending to win favor.
Maintain fiscal responsibility.

title: Healthcare Reform
description: There is a strong push from the public for universal healthcare reform.

options.text: Implement sweeping healthcare reforms.
Offer minor subsidies instead.

title: Military Exercise
description: Our generals want to conduct a massive military exercise to show off our strength.

options.text: Approve the grand military exercise.
Scale it down to save costs.

title: Global Market Crash
description: International stock markets are crashing. Panic is spreading to our exchanges.

options.text: Bail out key national industries.
Let the free market correct itself.
